system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_order_getbyorder","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_ORDER_GetByOrder] (@OrderNumber NVARCHAR (200))
AS
BEGIN
   SELECT a.id,
          a.customer,
          a.agent,
          [range] = CASE WHEN ISNULL (a.[range], '') = '' THEN b.hehang ELSE a.[range] END,
          a.order_number,
          a.item_number,
          cust_item_number = CASE WHEN ISNULL (a.cust_item_number, '') = '' THEN b.masp_khachhang ELSE a.cust_item_number END,
          b.mausac AS 'color',
          b.tensp AS 'description',
          b.tensp_vn,
          c.chitiet,
          material = B.nguyenlieu,
		  A.tenkhoahoc,
          order_qty = AVG (a.order_qty),AVG (CAST (b.cbm AS DECIMAL (18, 3))) cbm,
          dongia = AVG (c.dongia),
          price = AVG (IIF (a.price = 0, B.dongia, a.price)),
          currency = IIF (ISNULL (a.currency, '') = '', B.loaitien, a.currency),
          amount = AVG (a.amount),
          a.bill_to,
          a.ship_to,
          a.destination_port,
          a.etd,
          a.ship_date,
          ship_qty = AVG (a.ship_qty),
          input_qty = AVG (a.input_qty),
          a.order_date,
          a.cont_date,
          a.container_size,
          a.nccht,
          a.payment_term,
          a.remark,
          a.cust_po_number,
          a.attribute4,
          a.choduyet,
          a.f_cancelled,
          a.Finished,
          a.create_by,
          a.create_date,
          a.update_by,
          a.update_date,
          b.m3,
          b.masp_khachhang,
          b.tensp,
          b.IsBaoBi,
          b.IsGoVan,
          b.IsNguKim,
          b.IsSon,
		  a.fsc_100, a.fsc_cw, a.fsc_mix, a.fsc_recycled,
		  SUM(DISTINCT b.n_weight) AS n_weight, 
		  SUM(DISTINCT b.g_weight) AS g_weight
   FROM tr_order_detail a
        LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham b ON a.item_number = b.masp
        LEFT JOIN
        (SELECT DISTINCT dh.maddh,
                         ct.masp,
                         ct.chitiet,
                         ct.dongia,
                         dh.donhang
         FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet ct
              INNER JOIN tr_dondathang dh ON ct.maddh = dh.maddh
         WHERE ct.chitiet LIKE 'W%' AND dh.active = 1 AND dh.pheduyet = '1')
        c
           ON     a.item_number = c.masp
              AND CHARINDEX (a.order_number, c.donhang) > 0
   WHERE order_number = @OrderNumber AND f_cancelled = 'N'
   GROUP BY a.id,
            a.customer,
            a.agent,
            a.[range],
            b.hehang,
            a.order_number,
            a.item_number,
            a.cust_item_number,
            b.masp_khachhang,
            --a.description,a.color,
            c.chitiet,
            --a.material,
            b.nguyenlieu,
			A.tenkhoahoc,
            IIF (ISNULL (a.currency, '') = '', B.loaitien, a.currency),
            a.bill_to,
            a.ship_to,
            a.destination_port,
            a.etd,
            a.ship_date,
            a.order_date,
            a.cont_date,
            a.container_size,
            a.nccht,
            a.payment_term,
            a.remark,
            a.cust_po_number,
            a.attribute4,
            a.choduyet,
            a.f_cancelled,
            a.Finished,
            a.create_by,
            a.create_date,
            a.update_by,
            a.update_date,
            b.m3,
            b.masp_khachhang,
            b.tensp,
            b.IsBaoBi,
            b.IsGoVan,
            b.IsNguKim,
            b.IsSon,
			a.fsc_100, a.fsc_cw, a.fsc_mix, a.fsc_recycled,
            b.mausac,
            b.tensp_vn,
            b.tensp
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
